description: Sends messages, photos, or documents to Telegram chats or channels via a bot.

requiredFields.label: Chat ID
requiredFields.description: The Telegram chat or channel ID to send the message to

optionalFields.label: Message Text
optionalFields.description: The message text to send (supports Markdown)

optionalFields.label: Parse Mode
optionalFields.description: How to parse the message text

optionalFields.label: Disable Notification
optionalFields.description: Send the message silently without notification

optionalFields.label: Photo URL
optionalFields.description: URL of a photo to attach to the message

outputs.label: Chat Object
outputs.description: The Telegram chat object where the message was sent
